Become CEO of Your Success

Join the VIP Ecosystem: A firm built by advisors, for advisors.

Discover Our Opportunities

Notre Mission

At VIP Wealth Management and Investments, our mission isn't just to recruit, but to build sustainable careers, prosperous firms, and leading professionals.

We offer an unparalleled environment in Quebec, where human values, technology, and a unique business model come together to maximize your potential.

If you are ready to take full control of your financial future and offer exceptional value to your clients, your place is here.

Your Unique Value Proposition

The 3 Pillars of the VIP Advantage

This is where VIP GPI fundamentally stands out from the industry. Our model is designed for the entrepreneur in you.

A Revolutionary Business Model

(Total Control)

We offer you the freedom and structure of an entrepreneur, while providing the support of a major firm.

  • The Book belongs to you, unconditionally. Your clientele is your asset.
  • Become a firm leader. Create your own firm without limits on the number of advisors.
  • Multi-level override system. Your growth is rewarded.
  • Builders Program: Build a team with monetary benefits.
  • Recognition Program: Trips, awards, and outings to highlight excellence.

Elite Training and Coaching

(Professional Excellence)

We invest in your expertise to guarantee your constant success.

  • High-level continuous training.
  • Constant strategic, commercial, and human coaching.

Unrivaled Compensation & Partnership

(Uncompromising Independence)

Collaborate with top-tier partners:
Insurers: IA, Assumption, Canada Life, Manulife, Beneva, Sun Life, Humania, UV, and many others.
Financial Institutions: B2B Bank, RBC, BMO, Manulife, and more.

Result: You can offer the best market solutions, always adapted to your clients' real needs.

Your Ecosystem of Services

The One-Stop Shop for Growth

No more complicated external referrals. At VIP GPI, you offer a true one-stop-shop service.

Direct Services (Your Expertise)
  • Personal Insurance
  • General Insurance (Personal/Commercial)
  • Wealth Management & Private Wealth
  • Investments
Indirect Services (Our Partners)
  • Business Law Services
  • Immigration Consulting
  • Mortgage & Real Estate Brokers
  • Credit Repair Specialists
  • Accounting & Notaries

Benefit: More value for your clients, more revenue sources, and higher retention for your practice.

OFFICE VIDEO TOUR
Video coming soon

A Work Environment That Matches Your Ambitions

Performance feeds on well-being. That's why our offices were designed as a friendly, family-oriented, and stimulating space.

  • Modern and bright collaborative spaces.
  • Training & Events: Event hall.
  • Media: Professional recording studio.
  • Relaxation: Gym, cafeteria, game room, and lounge.

A Strong and Inclusive Culture

VIP is about team spirit and sharing within a diverse team. We place human values at the heart of every decision.


EMPLOYEE TESTIMONIAL
Video coming soon

Technological Edge

We invest massively to allow you to focus on what matters most: your clients.

  • Productivity: High-performance CRM and automation.
  • Prospecting: Access to qualified lead sources.

Find Your Path at VIP GPI

4 clear and structured paths to guide every profile towards success.

1. Conseillers
1. Licensed Advisors Pipeline

For professionals who are already certified and want to take it to the next level.

  • Higher performing business model
  • Solid strategic framework
  • Total independence, without compromise

Your next step: Move directly to our career accelerator.

2. Futurs Conseillers
2. Future Advisors Pipeline

For those who want to enter the industry with the right foundations.

  • Privileged access to LLQP courses
  • Structured mentorship
  • Continuous guidance until exam success and full integration

Your next step: Build solid foundations for your long-term success.

3. Cabinets
3. Firms & Agencies Pipeline

For firms wishing to accelerate their growth without losing their identity.

  • Optimize structure and profitability
  • Access strategic and technological resources
  • Benefit from a powerful ecosystem

Your next step: Join a network designed to propel ambitious firms.

4. Leaders
4. Team Leaders Pipeline

For visionary advisors who want to build a team without creating a firm.

  • Build and develop a high-performing team
  • Compensation model equivalent to a firm
  • Focus on leadership and growth

Your next step: Develop your organization without the administrative burden.

Your prosperity, our priority.
